title: Uragoga bisglaziovii

The genus Uragoga is a part of this family and is primarily found in tropical regions of Brazil. Within the genus, Uragoga bisglaziovii is considered a species of flowering plant. This species is likely a member of the Rubiaceae family due to its shared characteristics with other plants in this family, such as its flower structure and leaf morphology. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships of Uragoga bisglaziovii.
